findings.description: The Java retrieval code example for the List component is missing. The source shows how to access list items from a registered List component by index (list.get(0), list.get(1), list.get(2)) and how to cast them to the appropriate types. This demonstrates the usage pattern: get the parent component first via SystemRepository.getObject(), then access the list property, then retrieve items by positional index.

The hints array is missing `java.lang.Long` and `java.lang.Boolean`, which are explicitly listed as supported types in the source. The hints include `java.lang.String[]` and `java.lang.Integer[]` but not all PascalCase type names from the 10-item type list.
findings.source_evidence: Source type list items 3 and 7: `java.lang.Boolean` and `java.lang.Long`. Existing hints include `java.lang.String[]` and `java.lang.Integer[]` but omit these two.
